nodes.label: PressKit Pro README
nodes.summary: Setup guide describing Next.js 15 + Payload 3 + Tailwind on Postgres (Supabase) with hosted Supabase as the default dev path.
nodes.rationale: Hosted Supabase chosen over local Docker as default dev path to reduce friction; cloudflared tunnel required so Postgres trigger can reach localhost webhook.

nodes.label: Hosted Supabase Dev Path
nodes.summary: Dev runs against a hosted Supabase project (free tier) with cloudflared tunnel exposing localhost:3000 for the auth webhook.
nodes.rationale: No Docker required; auth webhook needs a public URL; tunnel rotates URL on each restart so app.webhook_url must be re-set.

nodes.label: Environment Variables
nodes.summary: App, Payload, Supabase, and auth-sync webhook env vars; SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is server-only.

nodes.label: ADR-0001 reference
nodes.summary: Reference to the Payload + Supabase split decision: identity authority, schema isolation, media model, admin auth.

nodes.label: next.config.ts
nodes.summary: Next config wrapped with withPayload(withNextIntl(...)) and Supabase image remotePatterns; reactCompiler disabled.
nodes.rationale: withPayload + withNextIntl composition allows i18n + Payload import map regen on build; supabase.co/.in image patterns allow public storage URLs.

nodes.label: payload.config.ts buildConfig
nodes.summary: Builds Payload config: postgresAdapter with schemaName 'payload', collections [Admins, Users, Profiles, Media], lexical editor, sharp.
nodes.rationale: schemaName 'payload' isolates Payload tables from Supabase auth schema (ADR-0001); admin user is Admins (separate identity from app users).

nodes.label: Payload generated Config
nodes.summary: Auto-generated TS types for collections admins/users/profiles/media + payload internals; user is Admin.

nodes.label: tailwind.config.ts
nodes.summary: Tailwind content scans app/, components/, payload/; font-sans uses --font-sans CSS variable.

nodes.label: postcss.config.mjs
nodes.summary: PostCSS pipeline: tailwindcss + autoprefixer.

nodes.label: RootLayout (app)
nodes.summary: Root layout loads Inter font with --font-sans variable and wraps children in Providers.

nodes.label: HomePage
nodes.summary: Landing page linking to /admin to bootstrap Payload.

nodes.label: Providers (React Query)
nodes.summary: Client component providing TanStack QueryClient with staleTime 30s and refetchOnWindowFocus disabled.

nodes.label: Payload RootLayout wrapper
nodes.summary: Wraps Payload admin RootLayout with config + importMap and exposes a serverFunction calling handleServerFunctions.

nodes.label: Payload admin importMap
nodes.summary: Auto-generated import map referencing CollectionCards from @payloadcms/next/rsc.

nodes.label: Admin RootPage
nodes.summary: Catch-all admin page delegating to RootPage from @payloadcms/next/views with config + importMap.

nodes.label: Admin NotFoundPage
nodes.summary: Renders Payload's NotFoundPage view for unmatched admin routes.

nodes.label: Payload REST catch-all route
nodes.summary: Exports REST_GET/POST/DELETE/PATCH/PUT/OPTIONS handlers from @payloadcms/next/routes bound to config.

nodes.label: Payload GraphQL route
nodes.summary: Exports GRAPHQL_POST and OPTIONS handlers.

nodes.label: Payload GraphQL playground route
nodes.summary: Exports GRAPHQL_PLAYGROUND_GET handler.

nodes.label: POST /api/media route
nodes.summary: Confirms uploaded object exists in Supabase Storage, looks up owner User by supabaseUserId in Payload, then creates a Media doc with bucket/path/mime/size/alt/owner; returns id + publicUrl.
nodes.rationale: Two-phase upload: separate sign + verify steps prevent phantom Media docs when uploads abort. Owner is enforced by mapping supabaseUserId to a Payload User (single source of identity per ADR-0001).

nodes.label: POST /api/storage/sign-upload route
nodes.summary: Validates bucket (avatars|gallery), MIME (jpeg/png/webp/avif), and size (<=10MB), then issues a Supabase createSignedUploadUrl scoped under {ownerSupabaseId}/{uuid}.{ext}.
nodes.rationale: 10MB hard ceiling with 2MB compression target; per-owner path prefix prepares for RLS. Server-side validation guards bucket/MIME before signing.

nodes.label: POST /api/webhooks/supabase-auth route
nodes.summary: Verifies x-webhook-secret header with timingSafeEqual, then on auth.users INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE upserts/deletes a Payload User keyed by supabaseUserId.
nodes.rationale: Constant-time comparison prevents timing attacks on shared secret. Schema/table guard (auth/users) ignores unrelated triggers. Default new user role='user', plan='free'.

nodes.label: constantTimeEqual()
nodes.summary: Buffer-based wrapper around node:crypto timingSafeEqual that returns false on length mismatch.

nodes.label: SpikePage
nodes.summary: Server component gated by ?spike=1 that lists synced Users + recent Media and renders the UploadWidget; live evidence for task-02 round-trip.
nodes.rationale: Visual proof that Supabase Auth -> Payload sync and Storage -> Media round-trip both work end-to-end.

nodes.label: UploadWidget (client)
nodes.summary: 3-step client flow: get auth user -> POST /api/storage/sign-upload -> uploadToSignedUrl -> POST /api/media; tracks status idle|signing|uploading|registering|done|error.

nodes.label: Supabase Auth -> Payload sync webhook
nodes.summary: Postgres trigger on auth.users posts to /api/webhooks/supabase-auth using app.webhook_url and app.webhook_secret; mirrors users into Payload Users collection by supabaseUserId.
nodes.rationale: Supabase auth.users is identity authority; Payload Users is application profile mirror keyed by supabaseUserId so Payload never owns passwords. Admins is a separate Payload-native identity.

nodes.label: Two-phase signed-upload + Media register flow
nodes.summary: Client requests signed upload URL, uploads to Supabase Storage directly, then asks server to register a Media doc after verifying the object landed.
nodes.rationale: Direct-to-storage upload avoids streaming through Next; server-side verification (createSignedUrl HEAD) prevents phantom Media metadata when client aborts.
